chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 5774 of 2019 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.25530/2019. 2. For hearing of main case. 13.02.2025 Mr. M. Umer Akhund, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ameer Bakhsh Metlo, advocate for the respondent. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Counsel states that this petition impugnes notice, however, the same shall be contested before the issuing authority. It is stated that the respondent department may be directed to adjudicate the same vide a speaking order, after providing opportunity of hearing, however, during pending aforesaid, no further coercive action be taken against the petitioners. Learned Assistant Attorney General has no cavil to the aforesaid and states that the petition may be disposed of in the above terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
